summary: Tested persistence hydration fix and shadow migration for Kawaii Sticker Trader. All critical flows passed.
critical_code_review_comments: trade.tsx hydration logic uses onFinishHydration + hasHydrated() pattern correctly — no race condition.
All shadow* props replaced with boxShadow CSS string format — confirmed 0 deprecated shadow* inline styles in DOM.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Persistence fix confirmed working: tradeCount=1 survived hard page reload. collectedIds (8/24) also persisted. AI offer zone populated after reload (not blank). No shadow deprecation warnings in console. 15 elements have boxShadow computed styles correctly. Stickerdex tab shows 8/24 collected correctly. Full trade flow (tap card → willingness 100% → accept → tradeCount++) works. Shadow visuals look correct on buttons, speech bubble, DishWell zones, header badges.
